source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 如题7所示，将额定电压为60 V的用电器，通过一理想变压器接在正弦交变电源上。闭合开关S后，用电器正常工作，交流电压表和交流电流表(均为理想电表)的示数分别为220 V和2.2 A。以下判断正确的是(　　)

choice_map.A: 变压器输入功率为484 W
choice_map.B: 通过原线圈的电流的有效值为0.6 A
choice_map.C: 通过副线圈的电流的最大值为2.2 A
choice_map.D: 变压器原、副线圈匝数比n1∶n2＝11∶3

extraction_notes: answer字段为多选字母“BD”，已按题目内选项映射展开为答案文本

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says "如题7所示", indicating the figure is part of the problem statement
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false in the input
the circuit/instrument placement is not fully recoverable from text alone, so the image is likely necessary
multi_step: the item asks which options are correct among 4 choices, requiring evaluation of multiple statements rather than a single lookup
solving involves combining ideal transformer relations across voltage, current, power, and turns ratio
one option requires distinguishing effective value from maximum value for AC current, adding an additional reasoning step
verifiability: answer is a discrete multiple-choice result ("BD"), which is straightforward to check
the quantities in the question are numeric and governed by standard ideal-transformer formulas, so the reasoning path is checkable
asset_registry_record shows registry_passed=true, answer_present=true, and question_present=true

decision_reasons: 题干、答案与配图资产齐全，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空，核心语义支撑完整
虽然题干明确依赖图像，但所需图片已存在，因此不存在因缺图导致的语义缺口
初步评分中 image_dependency、multi_step、verifiability 均较高，样本可验证性强且具有较好保留价值
